referenceObject.reference: Ranasinghe, U. G. S. L. & Benjamin, S. P. (2018b). Taxonomic descriptions of nine new species of the goblin spider genera Cavisternum, Grymeus, Ischnothyreus, Opopaea, Pelicinus and Silhouettella (Araneae, Oonopidae) from Sri Lanka.
